description_long: This object consists of two crossed swords, each with distinct visual characteristics. The first sword features a black blade with a silver, angular crossguard and a hexagonal pommel, giving it a modern, fantasy-inspired appearance. The second sword has a light, metallic blade with a more traditional crossguard and a matching light-colored handle, suggesting a classic longsword design. Both swords have straight, double-edged blades and are of similar length, with the black sword appearing slightly more robust. The handles are cylindrical and appear to be wrapped or textured for grip. The overall look is striking, with a strong contrast between the dark and light elements, and the swords are presented as a pair, possibly for display or ceremonial use.
description: A pair of crossed swords, one black with a modern angular guard and one light metallic with a classic design, both featuring straight double-edged blades.
description_view_0: Two crossed swords are fully visible, showing both the black angular-guard sword and the light metallic classic sword in detail.
description_view_1: The swords are viewed edge-on, making the blades appear thin and showing the handles aligned vertically.
description_view_2: The crossed swords are visible from the opposite side, highlighting the back of the guards and the symmetry of the blades.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, with the handles and blade thickness visible but minimal detail on the guards.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, wrapped or textured, with hexagonal and rounded pommels
attribute_ornamentation: geometric guard design on black sword
